verses.text: Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Hih thuciamna thute ngai in la, Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite kiangah va gen in
Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah, hih thuciamna a manglo mi peuhmah in hamsiatna thuak ta hen, ci-in va gen in

Tua pen na pute na pate uh, sik haltuina meikhuk tawh a kibang Egypt gam pana ka lakkhiat ni-a ka thuciamna ahi hi. Tua ni-in, ka thu hong ngai-in kong thupiakna bangin na sep uh leh, note ka mi na hi ding uh a, kei pen note' Pasian hi-in

tua bang na hih uh leh na pute na pate uh tungah ka ciamsa, tu-a na neih uh bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gam kong pia ding hi, ci-in thu ka pia hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hi ta hen, Topa aw,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih thuciamna thute ngai-in a sepna dingun Judah gam khuapite leh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah va taangko in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiat pana kipan tuni ciangdong ka thu hong mang un, ci-in na pute na pate uh tungah tam veipi nakpi takin ka hilh ngitnget hi

Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mangloin a bil uh hong ngatlo uh a, a gitlohna lungsim uh a zui tentan uh hi. Hih thuciamna a zuih ding uh thu ka piak hangin hong nial veve uh ahih manin tua sunga thute a vekpi-in ka tungsak ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in hong hopih leuleu a, “Judah minamte leh Jerusalem khuamite in kei hong langpang uh hi

Ka thu a ngai nuamlo a pu a pate uh' mawhna lamah kilehhei khinzo uh a, pasian dangte' na a sem dingin a zui khinzo uh hi. Israel mite leh Judah mite in a pu a pate uh tawh ka bawlsa uh thuciamna a palsat khinzo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, en un, a pelh theihloh uh gimna amau' tungah ka tungsak ding a, kei kiangah a hong kap liang uh zongin ka dawng nawn kei ding hi

Tua ciangin Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite in meihal biakna tawh a biak uh a pasian-te uh' kiangah pai-in a va thum ding uh hi. Ahih hangin hih gimna hong tun' ciangin a honkhia thei tuan kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh, Judah aw, na khua om zahzah uh pasian na nei uh a, Jerusalem khua kongzing om zahzah mah, meihal biakna tawh Baal biakna ding a zumhuai biakna taute na bawl tazen uh hi
“Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih mite-a' ding thu ngetsak kei in la, amau' tangin thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in gim ngahin hong sap uh ciangin ka ngai kei ding hi

Ka itte in siatna a bawl khit uh ciangin ka biakinn sungah bang thu nei thei nawn ding ahi uh hiam? Nong kamkhapte uh leh na biakpiakna sate un na kisiatna ding uh hong kipelhsak thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ciangin note na lungdam thei ding uh hiam
Nidang lai-in Topa in note, a hing dikdek a gahpha oliv kung tawh kong genteh ngei hi. Ahih hangin kong hal ding a, na hiangte uh kangtumin ging huhu ding hi

Israel mite leh Judah mite in meihalna tawh Baal bia-in hong hehsak uh a, hih bang siatna bawl uh ahih manin, amaute a phut keimah Vanglian Topa in amaute' tungah siatna a tun'na ding thu ka piazo hi,” hong ci hi.
Ka galte in kei a hong sawmna uh Topa in nong hilh ciangin ke'n ka thei pan hi

A kigo dingin a kipaipih mawhna a neilo tuuno bang ka hi hi. Amaute in, “Singkung a gahphat hun laitakin phuktan ni. Ama min a kiphawk nawnlohna dingin amah thatlum ni,” ci-in a gen uh a, kei hong sawmna uh ahihlam ka thei kei kha hi
Ahih hangin thu a mantakin khenin, mihingte' lungsim leh a ngaihsutna uh a entel a Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thuhkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka thu kong ap khin hi
Tua ahih manin kei hong that nuamin, “ Topa' min tawh thu hilh kei in. Na hilh leh kote' khutlumin na si ding hi,” a hong ci Anathoth khuamite tawh kisai-in
Vanglian Topa in, “En un, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. A tangvalte uh namsau-in si ding uh a, a tapate leh a tanute uh kialin a puksi ding uh hi
Anathoth khuamite tungah siatna tungsakin gim ka piak hun ciangin a suakta kuamah a om nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
